faq.title: Get the Clarity You Need
faq.description: Clear answers to help you understand Noor and get started with confidence

questions.q1: What is Noor, and how can it help me?
questions.a1: Noor is an all-in-one Islamic learning and daily worship app designed to help you learn the Qur'an with AI, improve recitation, stay consistent with zikr, and manage your daily religious practices — all in one thoughtfully built platform
questions.a2: Yes. Noor is designed for all levels — from complete beginners to advanced learners. The education and memorization features are structured step by step, so you can start at your own pace without feeling overwhelmed.
questions.q3: What makes Noor different from other Islamic apps?
questions.a3: Noor combines advanced technology, authentic Islamic content, and careful design in one experience. Features like Quran AI, real-time correction, a large multilingual hadith library, unique zikr tools, and a unified learning system are rarely found together in one app
questions.q4: Do I need to pay to use Noor?
questions.a4: You can start with the Free plan, which includes essential features for learning and daily practice. Premium and Family plans unlock the full experience and support the continued development of the platform
questions.q5: Can I use Noor with my family?
questions.a5: Yes. The Family plan allows up to five members under one subscription, making it easy for everyone at home to learn, practice, and grow together

testimonials.title: Trusted by Learners Around the World
testimonials.description: Real stories from people who use the app to learn, practice, and stay connected to their faith every day

items.name: Zaynab Xomis
items.quote: This app completely changed how I approach Qur'an memorization.
items.text: I used to struggle with consistency and didn't know if I was reciting correctly. The structure, guidance, and calm design helped me build a daily habit and feel confident in my progress for the first time

items.name: Hassan Ahmad
items.quote: The zikr experience is something I've never seen in another Islamic app.
items.text: Having categorized zikrs with audio and a beautifully designed tasbeeh makes remembrance feel intentional and focused. It's no longer just counting — it feels meaningful.

items.name: Sofia Muhammad
items.quote: I finally understand what I'm reciting, not just repeating words.
items.text: The learning sections and real-time correction helped me notice mistakes I had been making for years. It feels like having gentle guidance without pressure.

items.name: Mahmood Mansur
items.quote: This is the first Islamic app that actually feels complete.
items.text: Prayer times, learning, zikr, and memorization all work together seamlessly. I don't need multiple apps anymore — everything is thoughtfully connected in one place.

items.title: Best Qibla Experience
items.description: More than a compass – a visually refined Qibla screen designed to feel clear, calm, and intuitive from the first glance

items.title: 40K+ Hadith Library
items.description: One of the largest mobile hadith libraries, currently available in four languages — thoughtfully organized for daily reading and learning

items.title: Missed Prayers
items.description: Understand and manage your qaza prayers with a clean, structured view that helps you move forward with confidence

items.title: Zikr - Reinvented
items.description: A thoughtfully designed zikr experience with audio guidance, smart categorization, and a custom tasbeeh design you won't find in any other app

items.title: Adaptive Prayer Times
items.description: A living prayer screen that changes with each prayer, highlights important Islamic days, and lets you fully customize your adhan alerts

items.title: Learn Step by Step
items.description: A structured learning space covering the Arabic alphabet, tajweed, signs, and connections — designed to build real understanding

items.title: Learning, Turned into a Journey
items.description: A visual learning map that turns education into progress — motivating users to move forward lesson by lesson
